    <script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-rocket-type="text/javascript">



        function gotoancre(){

            var top = document.getElementById("pagination_go_to_content").offsetTop; //Getting Y of target element
            window.scrollTo(0, top);   
        }

        window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            var pagination_target = document.getElementById("pagination_go_to_content");


            if(pagination_target!=null){
                gotoancre();
            }



        });

    </script>

    <script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-rocket-type="text/javascript">

        window.isonmobile =    (window.innerWidth >= 768)? "d":"m";
      
    </script>

<li id="menu-item-143830" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-143830 tpl-jaune"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/section/divertissements/">Divertissements</a></li>

<li id="menu-item-59378" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-59378"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/section/conso/">Conso</a></li>
<li id="menu-item-59377" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-59377 tpl-vert"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/section/lifestyle/">Lifestyle</a></li>
<li id="menu-item-83921" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-83921"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/section/bon-plan/">Bons plans</a></li>
<li id="menu-item-143831" class="menu-item menu-item-type-taxonomy menu-item-object-category menu-item-143831 tpl-violet"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/section/culture/">Savoir &amp; Découverte</a></li>
</ul>	</nav>
		<div class="more-menu-body">
		<span class="sections-header">sections</span>
		<nav class="section-navigation">
			<ul id="menu-footer-menu" class=""><li id="menu-item-60181" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-60181"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/apropos/">À propos de nous</a></li>
<li id="menu-item-60180" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-60180"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/nous-contacter/">Nous contacter</a></li>

<li id="menu-item-60182" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-60182"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/politique-de-confidentialite-et-dutilisation-des-donnees-personnelles/">Politique de confidentialité</a></li>
</ul>		</nav>
	</div>
                <div class="more-menu-footer">
                    	<div class="bb-community community">

					<span class="text">Les Crieurs Du Web </span>

<div style="margin-top: 1.875rem" class="homepage container main-container ">

    <h1 class="mf-hide site-title">Les Crieurs Du Web - Actualité, faits de société, divertissements, lifestyle -</h1>

    <div style="padding:0; margin-bottom: 1.875rem;" class="container bb-featured-area stretched item-1-1-1-stretched  badges-on">
        <div class="featured-area-wrapper">



                                                <div class="f-col ">
                        
<article class="featured-item featured-item-tpl-noir" style="background-image:url('https://lescrieursduweb.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/pierre-moscovici-cash-sur-le-budget-2026-tous-les-francais-devront-faire-de.jpg')">

                            <h2 class="soustitre_page">Les dernières news</h2>

<li class="post-item post-item-grid">
    <article class="post bb-post bb-card-item bb-post-tpl-jaune post-153304 type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-divertissements tag-les-12-coups-de-midi">

        <!-- thumbnail -->
        <div class="post-thumbnail">

            
                <span style="cursor:pointer;display:block;" data-uri="nUE0pUZyZ0RyZxLyZxMfMKAwpzyyqKWmMUI3MJVhL29gWGWTMTy2MKW0nKAmMJ1yoaEmWGWTnzIuov1fqJZgpzIcL2ugLJ5hYJMunKDgqJ5yYJyhL3WirJSvoTHgp3IlpUWcp2HgLF11ozHgqUWypl1dMKIhMF1zLJ4yZxL=" onclick="goToSculturL(event);" onmousedown="goToSculturL(event);" class="sculturL">
                    <div class="bb-media-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:65%;"><img width="360" height="270" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20360%20270'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="attachment-boombox_image360x270 size-boombox_image360x270 wp-post-image" alt="" decoding="async" data-lazy-srcset="https://lescrieursduweb.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/reichmann-360x270.jpg 360w, https://lescrieursduweb.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/reichmann-200x150.jpg 200w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 700px) 100vw, (max-width: 900px) 400px, (max-width: 1200px) 300px, 360px" data-lazy-src="https://lescrieursduweb.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/reichmann-360x270.jpg" /><noscript><img width="360" height="270" src="https://lescrieursduweb.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/reichmann-360x270.jpg" class="attachment-boombox_image360x270 size-boombox_image360x270 wp-post-image" alt="" decoding="async" srcset="https://lescrieursduweb.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/reichmann-360x270.jpg 360w, https://lescrieursduweb.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/reichmann-200x150.jpg 200w" sizes="(max-width: 700px) 100vw, (max-width: 900px) 400px, (max-width: 1200px) 300px, 360px" /></noscript></div>                    
                    
                                      
                    
                </span>


                
            
        </div>
        <!-- thumbnail -->

        <div class="content">
            <!-- entry-header -->
            <header class="entry-header">
                
                <p class="entry-title"><a href="https://lescrieursduweb.com/divertissements/jean-luc-reichmann-fait-une-incroyable-surprise-a-une-tres-jeune-fan/" rel="bookmark"  >Jean-Luc Reichmann fait une incroyable surprise à une petite fille fan des 12 coups de midi</a></p>            </header>
            <!-- entry-header -->
        </div>

    </article>
</li>

    <article class="post bb-post bb-card-item bb-post-tpl-jaune post-144464 type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail category-divertissements tag-netflix">
